consistency.type_and_rarity_summary: Consistent. 'Wondrous item' and 'Very Rare' align with 'Wondrous item, very rare'.

quality.description_completeness: High. The description clearly outlines the benefit (INT +2, max increase), time requirement (48 hours over 6 days), duration of effect (permanent until loss), and reset condition (regains magic in a century).
quality.data_structure_quality: Good. All core fields (slug, name, type, rarity, description) are present and well-formed.

mechanics.activation_requirement: 48 hours of study over 6 days or fewer.
mechanics.primary_effect: Intelligence score increases by 2, maximum Intelligence score increases by 2.
mechanics.reusability: Single use; loses magic after effect is applied, regains magic after 100 years.

analysis.archivist_notes: This is a standard, mechanically defined consumable magic item (manual). The constraints on time (48 hours/6 days) and the permanent nature of the stat boost are clearly defined.
